reason: Rubric conflict: behavior_in_task_description requires specifying exact variable names (printSiteDataDeprecationInit, nopHugoSitesProvider, hugoSitesSitesProvider, HugoInfoHugoSitesProvider) that tests check via text matching, but no_solution_leakage forbids including those names as they spoil the fix. The instruction describes behavior (deprecation pattern, DataProvider interface) but cannot enumerate the gold-specific identifiers without violating no_solution_leakage. These are solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text failures indicating test design issues, not fixable via instruction rewrite.
